title: Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
content:
Language Teaching Application and Research Center - Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

HOW CAN I REGISTER FOR TURKISH COURSES?

You can come to our office for registration or send the required documents to us via email.

WHAT DOCUMENTS ARE REQUIRED FOR CONFIRMED REGISTRATION?

2 passport-sized photos (taken within the last 6 months)

Bank receipt showing the course fee payment

Photocopy of the passport page containing identity information

Registration form

DO I NEED TO BE A STUDENT OF ISTANBUL ESENYURT UNIVERSITY TO REGISTER FOR THE TURKISH COURSE?

No. You can take Turkish lessons at our center without being a student of Istanbul Esenyurt University.

CAN I START LEARNING TURKISH AT ANY LEVEL I WANT?

No. If you request, a Placement Test will be applied, and based on the result, you will be directed to the appropriate course level. If you do not want to take the test, you will start from level A1.

IS IT POSSIBLE TO CONTINUE LEARNING TURKISH WITH A LANGUAGE CERTIFICATE OBTAINED FROM ANOTHER INSTITUTION?

We do not accept certificates from every institution. You need to bring your certificate and submit it for evaluation by our administration.

ON WHICH DAYS AND FOR HOW LONG DO THE CLASSES TAKE PLACE?

Each course lasts 8 weeks. Morning and afternoon classes are available. Morning classes run from 09:15 to 13:00, afternoon classes from 14:00 to 18:00, Monday to Friday.

WHICH BOOK IS USED IN THE CLASSES?

The “Yedi İklim Türkçe” book is used in the classes.

ARE THE CLASSES HELD FACE-TO-FACE?

All Turkish courses at our language center are taught face-to-face at every level.

WHERE ARE THE CLASSES HELD?

Classes are held at Istanbul Esenyurt University, Esenyurt Campus.

HOW MANY STUDENTS ARE THERE IN EACH CLASS?

Classes consist of a minimum of 10 and a maximum of 25 students.

HOW DO I PROGRESS TO THE NEXT COURSE AFTER COMPLETING ONE?

At the end of each course, a Course Completion Exam is held. This exam measures the four basic language skills (reading, listening, writing, and speaking). Students who pass the exam continue to the next level, while those who fail repeat the course.

WHAT IS THE PASSING GRADE FOR COURSE COMPLETION EXAMS?

The passing grade is 60 for A1, A2, B1, B2 exams and 80 for the C1 exam.

HOW MUCH ARE THE COURSE FEES AND ARE DISCOUNTS AVAILABLE?

The fee for each course is $230.

If a student pays for 5 courses in advance, the discounted total fee is $1000.

CAN I PAY THE COURSE FEE IN INSTALLMENTS?

If payment is made in full, it is possible to pay in two installments.

CAN I PAY THE COURSE FEE IN TURKISH LIRA?

You can pay the course fee in either US Dollars or Turkish Lira.

WHERE AND HOW SHOULD I MAKE THE COURSE FEE PAYMENT?

You should deposit the course fee to the bank accounts below and fill out the explanation section as specified. The receipt of the payment must be submitted during registration.

DOLLAR ACCOUNT

KUVEYT TÜRK BANK

Account Name: İSTANBUL ESENYURT ÜNİVERSİTESİ

IBAN: TR67 0020 5000 0938 9892 5001 03

HALKBANK

Account Name: İSTANBUL ESENYURT ÜNİVERSİTESİ

Account Number: 100005998

IBAN: TR54 0001 2009 6040 0010 0005 98

(In the explanation section: write "Tomer Student, Name-Surname, Turkish ID Number.")

IF I REGISTER BUT CANNOT ATTEND THE CLASSES, WILL THE COURSE FEE BE REFUNDED?

No. Since a seat is reserved for you in the class quota upon registration, the course fee is non-refundable under any circumstances.

IS ATTENDANCE MANDATORY FOR THE CLASSES?

Yes, you must attend at least 80% of the classes for each course. Students who do not meet the attendance requirement will not be allowed to take the course completion exam and cannot proceed to the next level.

Yes, it is possible. You need to come to our office and fill out the relevant form.

CAN I TRANSFER MY COURSE RIGHT TO SOMEONE ELSE?

No, you cannot transfer your course right to another person.

WHO CAN TAKE THE TURKISH LANGUAGE EXAM?

Anyone who wants to certify their Turkish language proficiency can take the Turkish Language Exam.

HOW MUCH IS THE TURKISH LANGUAGE EXAM FEE?

The exam is free for Istanbul Esenyurt University students. The fee is $100 for external candidates.

ARE THE ISTANBUL ESENYURT UNIVERSITY LANGUAGE CERTIFICATES VALID IN OTHER UNIVERSITIES?

Yes. The language certificates issued by Istanbul Esenyurt University Language Teaching Application and Research Center are valid in all universities.

This content was updated on 12/08/2025.
